# sandiegocoffee.co — LLMs.txt

> San Diego Specialty Coffee is a community-curated directory of 190+ specialty coffee shops and independent roasters in San Diego, CA. Built for and by the r/SanDiegoCoffeeBeans Reddit community. Features detailed roast profiles, brew methods, neighborhood guides, hours, and visitor info — designed for specialty coffee enthusiasts who want more than basic listings.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://sandiegocoffee.co/) — San Diego specialty coffee directory overview and featured locations
- [Interactive Map](https://sandiegocoffee.co/map.html) — Browse and filter 190+ mapped coffee locations across all San Diego neighborhoods
- [Roaster Stories](https://sandiegocoffee.co/roaster-highlights.html) — In-depth interview-style features on San Diego's independent specialty coffee roasters
- [News & Events](https://sandiegocoffee.co/news.html) — San Diego specialty coffee news, café openings, and community events
- [Blog](https://sandiegocoffee.co/blog.html) — Coffee guides, café visit reviews, and community posts
- [About](https://sandiegocoffee.co/about.html) — About the project and the r/SanDiegoCoffeeBeans community

## Do not index

- /admin.html
- /edit.html
